nasb.text: After them Zadok the son of Immer carried out repairs in front of his house. And after him Shemaiah the son of Shecaniah, the keeper of the East Gate, carried out repairs.

esv.text: After them Zadok the son of Immer repaired opposite his own house. After him Shemaiah the son of Shecaniah, the keeper of the East Gate, repaired.

cnv.text: 下一段由音麥的兒子撒督修築自己房屋對面的那段。再下一段由看守東門示迦尼的兒子示瑪雅修築。

ccb.text: 再接下来，音麦的儿子撒督修筑自家对面的那一段。 再下一段由看守东门的、示迦尼的儿子示玛雅修筑。
